seoTitle: Campania vs Cape Barren Island — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Campania and Cape Barren Island. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Campania vs Cape Barren Island: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Campania and Cape Barren Island.
heading: Campania vs Cape Barren Island — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Campania, Tasmania and Cape Barren Island, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cape Barren Island has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Campania (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Campania or Cape Barren Island safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Campania has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Cape Barren Island scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Campania scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Cape Barren Island scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Campania or Cape Barren Island?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cape Barren Island has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.92% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
